TestCase z23Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_array1 = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_array1, t1.array1, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.array1 = follow_case_array1;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        // No elements to process, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code: square each element of array1
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.array1[i] = follow_case.array1[i] * follow_case.array1[i];
    }

    return follow_case;
}
